title: Bolus removal device
abstract: An endoscopic device includes: a hollow tube with a proximal end and a distal end. The proximal end and the distal end form a fluid communication therebetween. The proximal end is removably coupled with a distal tip of an endoscope and where coupled, forms a substantially airtight connection with the distal tip of the endoscope. The distal end removably contacts an object to be retrieved so as to deliver a suction force provided by the endoscope to facilitate removal of the object.
claims: Claims Claims: 1. An endoscopic device, comprising: a hollow tube with a proximal end and a distal end, wherein the proximal end and the distal end form a fluid communication therebetween, wherein the proximal end is removably coupled with a distal tip of an endoscope and where coupled, forms a substantially airtight connection with the distal tip of the endoscope, and wherein the distal end removably contacts an object to be retrieved so as to deliver a suction force provided by the endoscope to facilitate removal of the object. 2. The endoscopic device of claim 1 further comprises a groove disposed at an interior surface of the proximal end. 3. The endoscopic device of claim 2 further comprises a stop, disposed between the groove and the distal end. 4. The endoscopic device of claim 1 further comprises dimples, divots, or texture at an interior surface of the proximal end. 5. The endoscopic device of claim 4 further comprises a stop disposed between the dimples, divots, or texture and the distal end. 6. The endoscopic device of claim 1 further comprises at least one tooth at an interior surface of the hollow tube. 7. The endoscopic device of claim 6, wherein the tooth is a serrated tip. 8. The endoscopic device of claim 1, wherein the endoscopic device is transparent. 9. The endoscopic device of claim 1, wherein the endoscopic device is made of elastomeric polymer material. 10. The endoscopic device of claim 1, wherein the endoscopic device is made in one-piece. 11. The endoscopic device of claim 1, wherein the distal end comprises a base perimeter larger than a base perimeter of the distal tip of the endoscope. 12. The endoscopic device of claim 1, wherein the distal end comprises a base perimeter smaller than a base perimeter of the distal tip of the endoscope. 13. The endoscopic device of claim 1, wherein the distal end comprises a base perimeter equal to a base perimeter of the distal tip of the endoscope. 14. The endoscopic device of claim 1, wherein the distal end comprises a base area larger than a base area of the distal tip of the endoscope. 15. The endoscopic device of claim 1, wherein the distal end comprises a base area smaller than a base area of the distal tip of the endoscope. 16. The endoscopic device of claim 1, wherein the distal end comprises a base area equal to a base area of the distal tip of the endoscope. 17. The endoscopic device of claim 1 further comprising elastomeric polymer material and non-elastomeric polymer material. 18. The endoscopic device of claim 1, wherein the endoscopic device is configured and sized to fit in an over-tube for the endoscopic device's safe removal without jeopardizing a patient's airway.
